theme_notes: Touchstones: USA's shock home-World-Cup loss to Turkey in the final seconds; UK PM Keir Starmer resigned (the country's 7th leader in 10 years); Supreme Court blocked asylum seekers at the border; Caitlin Clark took an elbow to the throat (attacker suspended); John Bolton pleaded guilty to retaining national defense info.
settled: Square. Unlike whatever just happened at that World Cup.
Balanced books. More than Downing Street has managed in a decade.
Settled. The Supreme Court's had a busier day than your ledger.
youOwe: Less than Turkey's margin of victory. Every bit as embarrassing.
The Supreme Court blocked 350,000 people this morning. Still can't block your debt.
Caitlin Clark took an elbow to the throat and played through. You owe $40.
World Cup group stage beer money. Pay up before the knockouts.
Turkey beat the US in the final seconds. You've had longer than that.
Britain's now shopping for a seventh prime minister. You're still on your first excuse.
That's disaster relief territory. Your partner isn't the Red Cross.
Two World Cup round-of-32 tickets. You can't even afford one good conscience.
JD Vance closed a Hormuz deal in 18 hours. You can't close a Venmo notification.
The Strait of Hormuz got reopened faster than this debt is moving.
Turkey eliminated the US on home soil. Your partner is losing patience on your home turf.
Keir Starmer left office with more grace than you'll show paying this back.
Britain has had seven prime ministers since you last paid on time.
The Supreme Court ruled on 350,000 fates in a morning. One payment plan. One morning.
John Bolton held onto things he shouldn't have. At least he eventually faced consequences.
Five grand. Cuba is redesigning its entire economy under less pressure from creditors.
Turkey sent the US home from their own World Cup. At this balance, they're not the villain.
John Bolton admitted to a federal crime faster than you've admitted you owe this money.
theyOwe: They owe you pocket change. Turkey owed the US a win. Both sting.
Less than a daily Supreme Court filing fee. Not a reason to let it slide.
Caitlin Clark got hit harder than this and still showed up. Document it.
That's World Cup souvenir money. Start the victory lap early.
The Strait of Hormuz crisis resolved faster than this will. Apply pressure.
More than Turkey beat the US by. Collect with the same energy.
The UK's on its seventh prime minister. Your partner's on their seventh excuse.
Keir Starmer resigned before letting things drag on. Useful precedent.
Caitlin Clark's attacker got suspended in 24 hours. Faster than this.
The Strait of Hormuz is back open. Your finances are still blocked.
The US lost at the home World Cup. Your money lost at your home. One is fixable.
Venezuela declared a national emergency in hours. This has been going on for weeks.
Britain cycled through seven leaders. You've cycled through zero repayments.
That's World Cup prize money. They're playing you like a group stage blowout.
The Supreme Court issued six landmark rulings today. They haven't issued one text.
John Bolton held classified documents for years with no remorse. Equally criminal.
Turkey knocked out the US at a home World Cup. Your partner has knocked out your trust.
JD Vance flew to Switzerland for this. Your partner won't move from the couch.
